name: simple-table
description: Evaluate and improve simple table slides — structured comparisons, financial tables, and aligned evidence grids
goal: Achieve consistent 12+/14 with readable tables, selective emphasis, and complete row-column evidence fidelity

prompts.text: Build a simple table slide with a quarterly P&L for Revenue, Gross Profit, Opex, and EBITDA across Q1 to Q4
Build a simple feature matrix table comparing three workflow tools across six features with the winner highlighted
Build a table slide comparing five plants across throughput, scrap rate, uptime, and labor hours
Build a table slide showing budget vs actual spend across six cost centers with variance percentages
Build a table slide listing eight projects with owner, status, due date, and risk level
Build a table slide comparing four customer segments by size, growth, margin, and retention
Build a supplier scorecard table across cost, quality, delivery, and ESG rating for five suppliers
Build a simple table slide with ten upcoming milestones, dates, dependency, and decision owner
Build a pricing summary table showing Basic, Pro, Enterprise plans with price, seats, support tier, and ROI
Build a compact risk register table with six risks, likelihood, impact, mitigation, and owner
